    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "LTV/CAC ratios and payback periods align with stated assumptions"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references noted or apparent in structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Income Statement, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement all present"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Comprehensive assumptions section with sources and benchmarks"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Consistent annual periods across all statements"},

    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash remains positive: Y1 $7,844K, Y2 $7,438K, Y3 $8,101K"},

    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Hiring plan detailed by department, $165K avg cost aligns with expense levels"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "0% tax rate clearly explained due to NOL carryforward"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear Y1, Y2, Y3 labeling throughout"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units clearly marked as ($000s) in all statements"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions section clearly separated from calculated results"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 5, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions sourced from Bessemer Cloud Index, KeyBanc survey, comparable companies like Datadog"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Comprehensive sensitivity analysis with 5 growth scenarios, key metric sensitivities, break-even analysis"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 5, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Detailed hiring ramps by department, 6-month sales rep ramp, 45-day recruiting cycles modeled"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Working capital changes modeled, runway calculated (36+ months), burn multiple tracked"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear sensitivity tables show impact of changing assumptions, break-even timing identified, key metrics tracked"}
  }
}
